case_number: Criminal Pre- Arrest Bail Application No.127/2023

chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 63 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of bail application 27.03.2023 Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed M. Junejo, Advocate for the applicants. Complainant Gul Hassan, present in person. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The applicants were admitted to interim pre-arrest bail, vide order dated 30.01.2023 and now the matter is fixed for confirmation of the same or otherwise. Through instant Criminal Bail Application, applicants Ali Gohar, Saeed and Umed Ali seek pre-arrest bail in Crime No.01 of 2023, registered at Police Station Qadirpur, under Sections 457, 380, 215, 506/2, P.P.C. Their earlier application for the same relief bearing Criminal Pre- Arrest Bail Application No.127/2023 was heard and dismissed by the learned Additional Sessions Judge-V, Sukkur, vide order dated 26.01.2023. Heard the learned Counsel for the applicants, learned D.P.G. and complainant, who is present in person. It appears that after investigation, police has submitted the challan against the applicants who are regularly attending the trial Court. The alleged offences does not fall within the prohibitory clause of Section 497, Cr.P.C.; hence, in such like cases basic rule is bail and not jail. Therefore, interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicants, vide order dated 30.01.2023 is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of. J U D G E Abdul Basit
